title: School Days
description:
School Days is a psychological romance drama anime that follows the complicated and emotionally destructive relationships between several high school students. The story centers around Makoto Itou, an ordinary teenage boy who develops feelings for Kotonoha Katsura, a quiet and beautiful girl he often sees while riding the train to school. Too shy to speak to her directly, Makoto secretly admires her from a distance and hopes to get closer to her someday.Everything changes when Sekai Saionji, one of Makoto’s cheerful classmates, discovers his crush and decides to help him confess his feelings to Kotonoha. Thanks to Sekai’s encouragement and support, Makoto slowly begins a relationship with Kotonoha. However, as the three spend more time together, hidden emotions, jealousy, and romantic tension begin to grow in unexpected ways. 

What initially appears to be a normal high school romance gradually transforms into a dark and emotionally intense story filled with betrayal, obsession, manipulation, heartbreak, and the consequences of selfish decisions. As Makoto becomes increasingly irresponsible with the feelings of the people around him, the relationships between the characters begin falling apart in painful and disturbing ways.The anime explores the emotional instability and immaturity of teenage relationships while showing how dishonesty, lust, and emotional neglect can destroy trust between people. Each character struggles with loneliness, insecurity, emotional dependency, and personal desires, creating a tense atmosphere that grows darker as the story progresses.School Days combines romance, psychological drama, and slice-of-life elements while presenting an unusually realistic and uncomfortable portrayal of toxic relationships and emotional consequences. Unlike traditional romantic anime, the series intentionally avoids idealized romance and instead focuses on the destructive side of human emotions and poor choices.The anime became infamous worldwide because of its shocking story progression and one of the most controversial endings in anime history. Despite dividing audiences, School Days remains widely remembered for its psychological tension, emotional impact, and its reputation as a romance anime that completely subverted viewer expectations.
